pdg_node.statement: (prior: NormalGamma prior hyperparameters, ss: Sufficient statistics of observations) -> NormalGamma posterior hyperparameters
pdg_node.informal_desc: Computes a closed-form Normal-Gamma posterior from a Normal-Gamma prior and sufficient statistics as a pure, immutable conjugate update.

declaration.name: normal_gamma_posterior_update
declaration.type_signature: (prior: NormalGamma prior hyperparameters, ss: Sufficient statistics of observations) -> NormalGamma posterior hyperparameters
declaration.docstring: Computes a closed-form Normal-Gamma posterior from a Normal-Gamma prior and sufficient statistics as a pure, immutable conjugate update.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Closed-Form Conjugate Hyperparameter Update for Scalar Location-Precision Models. Maps a prior hyperparameter tuple and aggregated observation moments into a posterior hyperparameter tuple within the same parametric family. The update fuses prior pseudo-evidence with sample count and low-order moments using exact algebraic formulas, so no sampling or numerical optimization is required. The operation is pure: it returns a new parameter object without mutating inputs.. Applications: Online calibration of scalar sensor bias/noise parameters in embedded monitoring systems using streamed summary moments., Adaptive estimation of voxel-wise intensity baselines and uncertainty in volumetric imaging reconstruction pipelines., Incremental quality-control modeling of manufactured part measurements where only batch summary statistics are retained., Real-time inference of per-link delay distributions in communication networks from aggregated telemetry counters.
